description_long: This is a small cylindrical plastic bottle with a ribbed white screw cap, containing Omega-3 Pro capsules by the brand JutaVit. The bottle features a predominantly white and blue label with red and yellow accents, displaying product information and branding. The front label includes the product name, dosage (1000 mg), and a count of 30 capsules. The back and side labels provide nutritional information, a barcode, and additional text in Hungarian. The bottle shows some signs of wear and dirt, particularly around the cap and upper rim. The cap appears to be tamper-evident, with a breakable ring at the base. The overall appearance suggests a typical over-the-counter supplement container found in pharmacies or urban environments.
description: A small white plastic bottle with a ribbed screw cap and colorful label for Omega-3 Pro capsules by JutaVit, showing product and nutritional information.
description_view_0: The front view displays the main label with the JutaVit brand, Omega-3 Pro name, dosage, and capsule count.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the nutritional information table and part of the yellow label section.
description_view_2: The back view shows the barcode, additional product details, and more of the white plastic bottle surface.
description_view_3: This view highlights the side of the label with some text and recycling symbols, as well as the tamper-evident ring under the cap.
